LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoHeavyHelmet.descriptio: A heavy, high-powered helmet complete with an embedded HUD system and diagnostics display. It's theorized that either a long-lost or far-advanced civilizations shock troopers would adorn this helmet before strike missions during the mechanoid wars. The helmet itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoHeavyHelmet.label: heavy crypto helmet
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoLightHelmet.descriptio: A lower-powered helmet with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth hood. It's theorized that either a long-lost or far-advanced civilizations scout troopers would adorn this helmet before recon missions during the mechanoid wars. The helmet itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_Apparel_CryptoLightHelmet.label: crypto helmet
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoArmor.description: Low-powered plasteel carapace armor draped with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth sash affixed over one shoulder, the armor emits a low electrical hum and feels smooth to the touch. The power supply itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow one's bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoArmor.label: crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoHeavyArmor.description: Heavy, high-powered plasteel plate armor affixed with an unknown but impossibly durable cloth cowl, the armor emits a low electrical hum and feels smooth to the touch. The power supply itself features embedded cryptocasket technology and will use a stasis effect to slow ones bleeding.
LanguageData.VQE_CryptoHeavyArmor.label: heavy crypto armor
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoArmor.description: An unfinished piece of metal armor.
LanguageData.VQE_UnfinishedCryptoArmor.label: unfinished crypto armor
